description:
The Modrinth App is a unique, open source Minecraft launcher that allows you to play your favorite mods, and keep them up to date, all in one neat little package.


Changed
- Improved performance of the instance settings modal.
- Updated translations
- Modrinth Hosting: Improved performance of the server settings modal.
- Modrinth Hosting: Updated translations

Fixed
- Fixed issue in the Content tab where pressing the "Content" button on the linked modpack card would show zero mods in the Modpack content modal for a few seconds.
- Fixed issue with modal close animations.
- Fixed not being able to click scroll bar on "game version" menu when creating new instance.
- Modrinth Hosting: Fixed issue where users were not able to upgrade their Medal servers after the trial expired.
